subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-04-24 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Now that sacred tent which belonged to the Manifestation of God, the tent under which the Suratu'l-Haykal, the Kitab-i-Aqdas and other glorious Tablets were revealed... is given by the violators of the Covenant to Jamal Pasha
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @universal peace; world unity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
